chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2207 of 2014 CP D 2168 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.10318/2014 2. For hearing of main case 14.05.2025 Mr. Rasheed Ashraf, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Rana Sakhawat Ali advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel states that finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the assessment be finalized after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
